creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
amdmi3      2008-10-01 10:06:38 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    multimedia           Makefile 
  Added files:
    multimedia/libtuner  Makefile distinfo pkg-descr pkg-plist 
  Log:
  libtuner provides userspace drivers and support routines for
  a variety of TV and radio tuner ICs.  These ICs are usually
  attached to a peripheral bus (such as an I2C bus) embedded
  on a tuner card, and "stub" device nodes for the ICs will
  be exported by a card-specific driver.
  
  PR:             127668
  Submitted by:   Jason Harmening <jason dot harmening at gmail dot com>
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.274     +1 -0      ports/multimedia/Makefile
  1.1       +20 -0     ports/multimedia/libtuner/Makefile (new)
  1.1       +3 -0      ports/multimedia/libtuner/distinfo (new)
  1.1       +5 -0      ports/multimedia/libtuner/pkg-descr (new)
  1.1       +23 -0     ports/multimedia/libtuner/pkg-plist (new)
